payload.text: خلي ردودك عليا بالعربي - في عرض ملف اي مريض اريد البيانات المتواجده داخل الامراض المزمنه - تكون معروضه بين قوسين وبخط احمر كبير بجوار اسم المريض داخل الملف  ولا تؤثر عليه في الطباعه وباقي الاشياء

**Considering Arabic Display**

I'm focusing on displaying "Chronic Complaints" in Arabic within the patient profile. My current plan is to render this information directly next to the patient's name, enclosed in parentheses and using a bold red font. This is intended solely for visual representation within the UI; it won't impact print formatting.


**Implementing Chronic Complaints**

I've located where the patient's name is rendered in `PatientDetail.tsx`. My next step is to add a conditional span displaying "Chronic Complaints" data, enclosed in parentheses, next to the name. I'm opting for inline styling to make it large, red, and visible within the UI. I'm confident this won't impact print output, as the prescription printing logic is isolated.


**Refining the UI Integration**

I've decided on a class-based approach. I'll add a specific class, `chronic-complaints-badge`, to the `index.html` style block and apply it within `PatientDetail.tsx`. This approach allows for cleaner and easier-to-maintain styling. I've confirmed the property name `chronicComplaints` in `types.ts`. I also considered the "large red font" and decided the default size is fine. I'm now updating `index.html` and `components/PatientDetail.tsx`.

أهلاً بك يا هندسة. سأقوم بإجراء التعديلات المطلوبة لعرض "الأمراض المزمنة" بجانب اسم المريض في ملفه الشخصي بخط أحمر عريض وواضح، مع ضمان عدم ظهورها في الطباعة.

### التعديلات المقترحة:

1.  **في ملف `index.html`**: إضافة تنسيق CSS خاص لتمييز الأمراض المزمنة (اللون الأحمر، الخط العريض، الحجم الكبير).
2.  **في ملف `components/PatientDetail.tsx`**: تعديل منطقة العنوان (Header) لإظهار قيمة `chronicComplaints` بين قوسين بجانب الاسم مباشرة.

/* 3. BASE STYLES */
html, body, #root {

/* 4. LAYOUT & UTILITY CLASSES */

/* Icon Wrapper Sizing - ROBUST PATTERN */
.icon-wrapper {

/* 5. COMPONENT STYLES */

/* Card & View Containers */
.card {
    padding: 1rem;
    background-color: var(--surface);
    color: var(--text-primary);

.sidebar {

}
.sidebar-btn-label {

}
.sidebar-btn:hover {

    color: var(--primary-focus);
}
.sidebar-btn.active {

    color: var(--primary-content);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
}
.sidebar-btn.logout:hover {
    background-color: var(--danger-content);
    color: var(--danger);
}

/* Login Screen */
.login-screen {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    min-height: 100%;

}
.login-card {

.login-header { text-align: center; }
.login-title { font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--primary); }
.login-subtitle { margin-top: 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary); }
.login-form { margin-top: 2rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
.error-text { font-size: 0.875rem; text-align: center; color: var(--danger); }

/* Buttons */
.btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05);
    transition: background-color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
    cursor: pointer;
}
.btn:disabled { background-color: var(--text-secondary); cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.7; }
.btn-primary { background-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-content); }
.btn-primary:hover { background-color: var(--primary-focus); }
.btn-secondary { background-color: var(--secondary); color: var(--primary-content); }
.btn-secondary:hover { background-color: var(--secondary-focus); }
.btn-accent { background-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-content); }
.btn-accent:hover { background-color: var(--accent-focus); }
.btn-success { background-color: var(--success); color: #fff; }
.btn-success:hover { background-color: var(--success-focus); }
.btn-danger { background-color: var(--danger); color: #fff; }
.btn-danger:hover { background-color: var(--danger-focus); }
.btn-light { background-color: var(--surface-alt); color: var(--text-primary); border-color: var(--border); }
.btn-light:hover { background-color: var(--border); }
.btn-sm { padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }
.btn-icon { padding: 0.5rem; line-height: 1; font-size: 1.5rem; }
.btn-icon-danger { padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background-color: var(--danger-content); color: var(--danger); }
.btn-icon-danger:hover { background-color: var(--danger); color: white; }
.btn-action {
    padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    border-radius: 0.25rem;
    background-color: transparent;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background-color 0.2s;
}
.btn-action.btn-info {
    color: var(--info);
    background-color: transparent;
}
.btn-action.btn-info:hover {
    background-color: var(--info-content);
}
.btn-action.btn-danger {
    color: var(--danger);
    background-color: transparent;
}
.btn-action.btn-danger:hover {
    background-color: var(--danger-content);
    color: var(--danger);
}
.btn-info { background-color: var(--info-content); color: var(--info); }
.btn-whatsapp {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
    font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: white; background-color: #25D366;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius); transition: background-color 0.2s;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
}
.btn-whatsapp:hover { background-color: #128C7E; }

/* Forms & Inputs */
.input {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    background-color: var(--surface);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05);
}
.input:focus {
    outline: 2px solid transparent;
    outline-offset: 2px;
    border-color: var(--border-focus);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--border-focus);
}
.input:disabled { background-color: var(--surface-alt); cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.7; }
textarea.input { min-height: 80px; }
.input-label { display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-primary); }
.input-label-sm { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; }

input[type=range] {

    width: 100%;
    height: 8px;
    background: var(--border);
    outline: none;
    border-radius: 4px;
}

    -webkit-appearance: none;
    appearance: none;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    background: var(--primary);
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 50%;
}
input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    background: var(--primary);
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 50%;
}

.form-container-alt {
    padding: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;

    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
}
.form-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-secondary); }

/* Searchable Select (Custom Dropdown) */
.searchable-select-wrapper {
    position: relative;
}
.searchable-select-dropdown {
    position: absolute;
    top: calc(100% + 4px);
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    background-color: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    max-height: 200px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    z-index: 60; /* Higher than modal overlay's z-index of 50 */
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
}
.searchable-select-option {
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background-color 0.2s;
}
.searchable-select-option:hover {
    background-color: var(--surface-alt);
}
.searchable-select-option.active {
    background-color: var(--primary);
    color: var(--primary-content);
}

/* Tables */
.table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.table { width: 100%; text-align: right; background-color: var(--surface); border-collapse: collapse; }
.table-header { position: sticky; top: 0; background-color: var(--surface-alt); }
.table-body { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
.table-cell { padding: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; }
.table-header .table-cell { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.table-row { transition: background-color 0.2s; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
.table-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.table-row:hover { background-color: var(--surface-alt); }

/* Modal */
.modal-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; z-index: 50; }
.modal-content {
    background-color: var(--surface);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
    width: 100%;
    max-height: 90vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    position: relative;
}
.modal-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding-bottom: 0.75rem; }
.modal-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; }
.modal-close-btn { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--text-secondary); background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; }
.modal-close-btn:hover { color: var(--text-primary); }
.modal-body { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; margin-top: 1rem; padding-right: 0.5rem; }
.modal-footer { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 0.75rem; }

/* Stats & Info Boxes */
.stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(1, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; }
.stat-item { padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.stat-item h3, .stat-item h4 { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; }
.stat-item p { font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; }
.stat-info { background-color: var(--info-content); border-color: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.5); }
.stat-info h3, .stat-info h4 { color: var(--info); }
.stat-info-light { background-color: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.1); border-color: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.3); opacity: 0.8; }
.stat-info-light h3, .stat-info-light h4 { color: var(--info); }
.stat-success { background-color: var(--success-content); border-color: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.5); }
.stat-success h3, .stat-success h4 { color: var(--success); }
.stat-success-light { background-color: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.1); border-color: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.3); opacity: 0.8; }
.stat-success-light h3, .stat-success-light h4 { color: var(--success); }
.stat-danger { background-color: var(--danger-content); border-color: rgba(var(--danger-rgb), 0.5); }
.stat-danger h3, .stat-danger h4 { color: var(--danger); }
.stat-secondary { background-color: rgba(var(--secondary-rgb), 0.1); border-color: rgba(var(--secondary-rgb), 0.3); }
.stat-secondary h3, .stat-secondary h4 { color: var(--secondary); }
.stat-accent { background-color: var(--accent-content); border-color: rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.5); }
.stat-accent h3, .stat-accent h4 { color: var(--accent); }

.info-box { padding: 1rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.info-box-alt { padding: 1rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); border: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
.info-box-title { font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }

/* Visit Card */
.visit-card {
    padding: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
    border-width: 1px;
    border-style: solid;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
}
.visit-card.is-exam {
    background-color: var(--success-content);
    border-color: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.5);
}
.visit-card.is-consultation {
    background-color: var(--info-content);
    border-color: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.5);
}
.visit-card-title {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1.125rem;
}
.visit-card.is-exam .visit-card-title { color: var(--success); }
.visit-card.is-consultation .visit-card-title { color: var(--info); }
.visit-card-title span {
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 1rem;
}
.visit-card-meta {
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}


/* Visit History Thread */
.visit-thread-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-right: 2rem; 
}
.visit-item {
    position: relative;
}
.visit-item.is-parent.has-no-children {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.visit-item.is-parent::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    right: -1rem;
    top: 2rem;
    bottom: -1rem;
    width: 2px;
    background-color: var(--border);
}
.visit-thread-container:last-child .visit-item.is-parent::before,
.visit-item.is-parent.has-no-children::before {
    display: none;
}
.visit-item.is-child {
    margin-right: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.visit-item.is-child::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    right: -2.5rem;
    top: 2.25rem;
    width: 1.5rem;
    height: 2px;
    background-color: var(--border);
}
.visit-item.is-child::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    right: -2.5rem;
    top: -0.75rem;
    bottom: calc(100% - 2.25rem);
    width: 2px;
    background-color: var(--border);
}
.visit-item.is-child.is-last-child::after {
    bottom: calc(100% - 2.25rem);
}


/* Prescription Print */
.prescription-print { position: relative; padding: 1.5rem; background-color: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--border-radius); color: var(--text-primary); height: 100%; }
.prescription-header { margin-bottom: 2rem; }
.prescription-patient-info {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.prescription-info-item {
    position: absolute;
    white-space: nowrap;
}
.prescription-body { padding-top: 1rem; min-height: 40%; }
.prescription-items-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
.prescription-item-print { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; }
.prescription-notes-section { margin-top: 1.5rem; }
.prescription-notes-text { padding: 0.5rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: 0.25rem; margin-top: 0.25rem; }
.prescription-follow-up { margin-top: 1.5rem; text-align: center; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9em; border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; }
.prescription-footer { margin-top: 4rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; }

/* Tags */
.tag { padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 9999px; }
.tag-info { background-color: var(--info-content); color: var(--info); }
.tag-info-light { background-color: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.1); color: var(--info); opacity: 0.8; }
.tag-success { background-color: var(--success-content); color: var(--success); }
.tag-success-light { background-color: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.1); color: var(--success); opacity: 0.8; }
.tag-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background-color: var(--accent-content); color: var(--accent); }
.tag-delete-btn { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1; opacity: 0.8; }
.tag-delete-btn:hover { opacity: 1; }

.symptom-tag {
    padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: 9999px;
    cursor: pointer;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background-color: var(--surface);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    transition: all 0.2s;
}
.symptom-tag:hover {
    background-color: var(--surface-alt);
}
.symptom-tag.active {
    background-color: var(--primary);
    color: var(--primary-content);
    border-color: var(--primary);
}
.last-consultation-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem;
    margin-inline-start: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.8em;
    font-weight: 700;
    border-radius: 9999px;
    background-color: var(--danger-content);
    color: var(--danger);
    vertical-align: middle;
}

/* Specific highlight for chronic complaints in patient profile */
.chronic-complaints-badge {
    color: var(--danger);
    font-size: 1.1em;
    font-weight: 800;
    margin-inline-start: 0.75rem;
    vertical-align: middle;
}


/* Tabs */
.tabs { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.25rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.tab-btn { padding: 0.25rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 0.375rem; transition: all 0.2s; border: none; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; }
.tab-btn.active { background-color: var(--surface); color: var(--primary-focus); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); }
.tab-btn:not(.active) { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.tabs-sm .tab-btn { padding: 0.375rem 1rem; }

/* List Item (for prescription history) */
.list-item { padding: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s; background-color: var(--surface-alt); }
.list-item:hover { background-color: var(--border); }
.list-item.active { background-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-content); }
.list-item.active p { color: var(--primary-content); }

/* AI Suggestions */
.ai-suggestion-list { list-style: disc; list-style-position: inside; background-color: var(--info-content); color: var(--info); padding: 0.75rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.suggestion-list { margin-top: 0.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
.suggestion-item { padding: 0.5rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; transition: background-color 0.2s; }
.suggestion-item:hover { background-color: var(--border); }
.suggestion-item span:last-child { font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); }

/* Miscellaneous */
.placeholder-view { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 100%; text-align: center; color: var(--text-secondary); padding: 2rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.notification { margin-top: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); text-align: center; }
.notification-success { background-color: var(--success-content); color: var(--success); }
.dropdown-menu { position: absolute; bottom: 100%; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; right: 0; width: 12rem; background-color: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--border-radius); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); z-index: 10; padding: 0.25rem; }
.dropdown-item { display: block; width: 100%; text-align: right; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-primary); border-radius: 0.25rem; cursor: pointer; }
.dropdown-item:hover { background-color: var(--surface-alt); }

/* About Page */
.about-section { padding: 1.5rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); border: 1px solid var(--border); }
.dua-section { margin-top: 2rem; padding-top: 1.5rem; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); text-align: center; }
.feature-list { list-style-type: disc; list-style-position: inside; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 1.125rem; }

/* Waiting List */
.waiting-list-count { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; background-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-content); padding: 0.25rem 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); }
.waiting-list-item { background-color: var(--surface-alt); padding: 1rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); border: 1px solid transparent; transition: border-color 0.3s; }
.waiting-list-item:hover { border-color: var(--primary); }
.waiting-list-number { flex-shrink: 0; width: 3rem; height: 3rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-content); border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; }

/* Reports */
.report-container { padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--border-radius); background-color: var(--surface-alt); }
.report-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.report-header.multi-part { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 1rem; }
.report-title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; }
.report-selector-btn {
    flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    padding: 1.5rem; font-size: 1.125rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    transition: all 0.3s; transform: translateY(0);
    box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
    background-color: var(--surface-alt); color: var(--text-primary);
    border: none; cursor: pointer;
}
.report-selector-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-0.25rem); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); background-color: var(--border); }
.report-selector-btn.active {
    background-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-content);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
}

/* Expenses Month Navigator */
.month-navigator {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    background-color: var(--surface-alt);
    padding: 0.25rem;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
}
.month-display {
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 0 1rem;
}
.month-nav-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0.5rem;
    background-color: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: 0.375rem; /* rounded-md */
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    cursor: pointer;
}
.month-nav-btn:hover {
    background-color: var(--border);
    color: var(--text-primary);
}
.month-nav-btn:disabled {
    opacity: 0.5;
    cursor: not-allowed;
    background-color: var(--surface-alt);
}

/* Settings */
.settings-section-title { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding-bottom: 0.5rem; }
.theme-selector { padding: 1rem; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--border-radius); cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; }
.theme-selector:hover { border-color: rgba(var(--primary-rgb), 0.5); }
.theme-selector.active { border-color: var(--primary); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); }
.theme-swatch { width: 2rem; height: 2rem; border-radius: 9999px; }
.color-picker { width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; padding: 0; border: none; border-radius: 0.375rem; cursor: pointer; -webkit-appearance: none; -moz-appearance: none; appearance: none; background-color: transparent; }
.color-picker::-webkit-color-swatch-wrapper { padding: 0; }
.color-picker::-webkit-color-swatch { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 0.375rem; }
.checkbox-label-alt { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: 0.375rem; cursor: pointer; -webkit-user-select: none; user-select: none; }
.checkbox { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; border-radius: 0.25rem; background-color: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--primary); }
.checkbox:checked { background-color: var(--primary); }
.settings-preview { background-color: var(--background); padding: 1rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); overflow-y: auto; }
.settings-preview-content { transform: scale(0.9); transform-origin: top; }
/* Collapsible Settings Section */
.settings-section-title-button {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
    text-align: right;
    background: none;
    border: none;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 0.5rem 0;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-family: inherit;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: color 0.2s;
}
.settings-section-title-button:hover {
    color: var(--primary);
}
.collapsible-icon {
    transition: transform 0.3s ease-out;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}
.collapsible-icon.open {
    transform: rotate(180deg);
}
.collapsible-content {
    max-height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: max-height 0.5s ease-in-out, opacity 0.3s ease-in-out, padding 0.5s ease-in-out;
    padding-top: 0;
    padding-bottom: 0;
}
.collapsible-content.open {
    max-height: 4000px;
    opacity: 1;
    padding-top: 1rem;
    padding-bottom: 1rem;
}
.settings-subsection-title {
    font-size: 1.125rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}

/* NEW: Prescription Settings Field Control */
.settings-field-control {
    padding: 0.75rem;
    background-color: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
}
.settings-field-control > .checkbox-label-alt {
    background-color: transparent;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
}
.settings-field-options {
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
    padding-top: 0.75rem;
    padding-right: 1rem;
    border-top: 1px dashed var(--border);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
}
.settings-field-options .checkbox-label-alt {
    padding: 0.5rem;
}
.settings-field-options .input {
    padding: 0.375rem 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.875rem;
}
.settings-position-inputs {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 0.75rem;
    align-items: center;
    margin-top: 0.75rem;
}
.settings-position-inputs .input {
    text-align: left;
    direction: ltr;
}


/* Mini Editor */
.editor-toolbar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-bottom: none; border-radius: 0.375rem 0.375rem 0 0; padding: 0.25rem; }
.editor-toolbar-btn { padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.25rem; color: var(--text-secondary); background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; }
.editor-toolbar-btn:hover { background-color: var(--border); color: var(--text-primary); }
.editor-toolbar-divider { margin: 0 0.5rem; height: 1.25rem; border-left: 1px solid var(--border); }
.editor-textarea { border-radius: 0 0 0.375rem 0.375rem; font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; resize: vertical; }
.editor-textarea:focus { border: 1px solid var(--border-focus); box-shadow: none; }
.price-summary-box {
    padding: 1rem;
    background-color: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 1rem;
}
.prescription-items-list {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; max-height: 150px; overflow-y: auto;
}
.prescription-item {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    padding: 0.5rem; background-color: var(--surface); border-radius: 0.375rem;
}
.template-card {
    padding: 1rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
}

/* 6. ANIMATIONS & RESPONSIVE STYLES */

/* Animation Keyframes */
@keyframes fade-in {
    from { opacity: 0; }
    to { opacity: 1; }
}
@keyframes fade-in-down {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-10px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}
@keyframes fade-in-highlight {
  from {
    background-color: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.3);
    opacity: 0.5;
  }
  to {
    background-color: transparent;
    opacity: 1;
  }
}

/* Animation Utility Classes */
.animate-fade-in-down {
    animation: fade-in-down 0.3s ease-out forwards;
}
.animate-new-item {
  animation: fade-in-highlight 1.5s ease-out forwards;
}

/* NEW: Follow-up Calendar View */
.follow-up-calendar-container {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    height: 100%;
}
.calendar-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    background-color: var(--surface-alt);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
}
.calendar-header h2 {
    font-size: 1.25rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--primary);
}
.calendar-weekdays {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    text-align: center;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 0.5rem;
    flex-grow: 1;
}
.calendar-day {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0.5rem;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    background-color: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    min-height: 5rem;
    position: relative;

<script>
    // Set theme before React loads to prevent FOUC
    (function() {
      const theme = localStorage.getItem('clinicAppTheme') || 'default';
      if (theme === 'custom') {
        const customColors = localStorage.getItem('clinicAppCustomThemeColors');
        if (customColors) {
          try {
            const colors = JSON.parse(customColors);
            const style = document.createElement('style');
            let css = ':root {';
            for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(colors)) {
              // Convert camelCase key to kebab-case for CSS variable
              const cssVar = key.replace(/[A-Z]/g, letter => `-${letter.toLowerCase()}`);
              css += `--${cssVar}: ${value};`;
            }
            css += '}';
            style.innerHTML = css;
            document.head.appendChild(style);
            // Add a class for non-customizable variables
            document.documentElement.className = 'theme-custom';
          } catch (e) {
            console.error("Failed to apply custom theme:", e);
            document.documentElement.className = 'theme-default'; // Fallback
          }
        } else {
            document.documentElement.className = 'theme-default'; // Fallback
        }
      } else {
        document.documentElement.className = 'theme-' + theme;
      }
    })();
  </script>

entries.description: تعديل عرض اسم المريض ليشمل الأمراض المزمنة بخط أحمر كبير بين قوسين

payload.text: مع المحافظه علي كل ما سبق من قائمه الادويه ثم الجرعات اجعل الارقام تظهر بها باللغه العربيه داخل الجرعات فقط مثال " يعطي 3 سم كل 12 ساعه " تكون الارقام بالعربيه في هذا الاجراء فقط ودون التاثير علي باقي اماكن ونظم البرنامج

**Displaying Chronic Complaints**

I'm focusing on incorporating "Chronic Complaints" (الأمراض المزمنة) into the patient file. My current plan involves displaying it next to the patient's name, enclosed in parentheses, in a large, bold, red font within the app. I'm making sure this specific display will be visible in the app interface but remain hidden during print operations.


**Refining Dosage Formatting**

I've shifted focus to Arabic numerals in dosages. The goal is now to convert Western numerals to Eastern Arabic numerals specifically in dosage displays. I'm adding a helper function and plan to apply it within medicine and prescription components. The CSS and patient detail changes are progressing well, and now I'll create a dedicated function to format numerals only in dosages.


**Adjusting Print Behavior**

I'm now integrating print-specific display rules. The "chronic complaints" badge requires the `no-print` class in JSX to hide it during printing. I'm focusing on preserving formatting of the Arabic numeral output in dosages within the print operation, which is the user requirement. The utility function `toArabicDigits(str)` will not be used in the `PrescriptionPrint.tsx` component, but will be used in the others listed, because of this.


**Clarifying Digital Transformations**

I'm now revisiting the nuances of Arabic numeral display, clarifying that the transformation to Arabic numerals needs to occur everywhere dosages are rendered. My focus is on ensuring this implementation does not affect print functionality. This also applies to the *chronic complaints*, ensuring correct display. The current direction aims to use the existing `toArabicDigits` function throughout the app for dosage displays, while the chronic complaints are designed to correctly display, both in the app, and during print operations.


**Implementing Arabic Digits**

I'm now expanding the Arabic numeral integration. I'm focusing on updating `PatientDetail.tsx`, `NewVisitModal.tsx`, `PrescriptionPrint.tsx`, and `PrescriptionsView.tsx` to display dosages with Arabic digits. I'm also ensuring the chronic complaints badge remains correctly hidden during print operations. I'm re-validating the `no-print` class usage and considering how to best update the PatientDetail component to display chronic complaints beside the name, which is a new requirement.


**Verifying Display Elements**

I'm now verifying the existing display logic for chronic complaints within the `PatientDetail.tsx` component. The badge with the `no-print` class is present, so the display logic is correctly in place. I'm confirming that the relevant CSS definition in `index.html` correctly hides the badge during printing, by setting display to none. I'm now making sure to update digits.


**Localizing Digits**

I'm now deciding on the best home for the `toArabicDigits` function. My initial thoughts are to either add it to `types.ts`, create a dedicated utils file, or define it locally within each component. Considering the simplicity and scope of changes, I'm leaning toward defining the function directly in the components, or `types.ts`. I will apply the function to `item.dosage` and `item.quantity` properties. I am also making sure only medication dosages and quantities are transformed. I will only update dosages, and quantities, but nothing else.


**Refining Numeral Rendering**

I'm now implementing the `toArabicDigits` helper function locally within each component for clarity. I'm focusing on dosages like "5 مل", ensuring they are correctly rendered with Eastern Arabic numerals. The plan is to replace `{item.dosage}` with `{toArabicDigits(item.dosage)}` in `PatientDetail.tsx`, `NewVisitModal.tsx`, `PrescriptionPrint.tsx`, and `PrescriptionsView.tsx`, updating medication quantity values as well. I'm prioritizing direct application and verifying the outcome. I'm also re-implementing the *chronic complaints* to the user's requested specification.


**Expanding Display Logic**

I'm now revisiting the CSS and logic for the "chronic complaints" badge within `PatientDetail.tsx`. I'll increase the font size of the badge to `1.4em` as requested. I'm also extending the Arabic numeral transformation to the dosage display in `MedicinesView.tsx` based on the user's specific request for Arabic numerals in the dosages only. The goal is to make all Arabic dosages in the application show numerals.

لقد قمت بتنفيذ التعديلات المطلوبة بدقة، حيث شملت التحديثات ما يلي:

1.  **الأمراض المزمنة**: تظهر الآن بجانب اسم المريض في ملفه الشخصي بخط أحمر عريض (Bold) وكبير، وتكون محاطة بقوسين. كما تم ضبطها لتختفي تلقائياً عند طباعة الروشتة أو أي تقارير لضمان مظهر احترافي.
2.  **الأرقام العربية (الهندية) في الجرعات**: تم إضافة وظيفة ذكية تقوم بتحويل الأرقام الإنجليزية (1, 2, 3) إلى أرقام عربية (١، ٢، ٣) حصرياً داخل حقول الجرعات وكميات الحقن في جميع أنحاء البرنامج (قائمة الأدوية، سجل الزيارات، القوالب الجاهزة، والروشتة المطبوعة)، مع الحفاظ على الأرقام الإنجليزية في باقي أجزاء النظام (مثل السن، التاريخ، الوزن، والماليات) لضمان دقة الحسابات والتقارير.

.mb-6 { margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
.me-2 { margin-inline-end: 0.5rem; }
.me-3 { margin-inline-end: 0.75rem; }
.mx-auto { margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; }

.text-sm { font-size: 0.875rem; }
.text-lg { font-size: 1.125rem; }
.text-xl { font-size: 1.25rem; }
.text-2xl { font-size: 1.5rem; }
.text-3xl { font-size: 1.875rem; }
.font-bold { font-weight: 700; }
.font-semibold { font-weight: 600; }
.font-medium { font-weight: 500; }
.italic { font-style: italic; }

.text-center { text-align: center; }
.text-left { text-align: left; }

.text-primary { color: var(--text-primary); }
.text-secondary { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.text-danger { color: var(--danger); }
.text-success { color: var(--success); }
.text-info { color: var(--info); }
.text-accent { color: var(--accent); }

.border { border: 1px solid var(--border); }
.border-b { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
.border-e { border-inline-end: 1px solid var(--border); }
.border-t { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
.border-default { border-color: var(--border); }

.rounded { border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.shadow-md { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); }
.overflow-hidden { overflow: hidden; }
.overflow-y-auto { overflow-y: auto; }
.relative { position: relative; }
.hidden { display: none; }
.whitespace-nowrap { white-space: nowrap; }
.whitespace-pre-wrap { white-space: pre-wrap; }
.opacity-50 { opacity: 0.5; }
.cursor-pointer { cursor: pointer; }
.transition-all { transition-property: all; transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transition-duration: 150ms; }

/* Icon Wrapper Sizing - ROBUST PATTERN */
.icon-wrapper {
    display: inline-flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    line-height: 1;
}
.icon-wrapper svg {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    stroke-width: 1.75;
}
.icon-xs { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; }
.icon-sm { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; }
.icon-md { width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; }
.icon-lg { width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; }
.icon-xl { width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; }
.placeholder-icon {
    width: 6rem; height: 6rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; color: var(--border);
}


/* 5. COMPONENT STYLES */

/* Card & View Containers */
.card {
    padding: 1rem;
    background-color: var(--surface);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
    display: flex;
}
.view-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}
.view-title {
    font-size: 1.875rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-primary);
}

/* Sidebar */
.sidebar {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    width: 16rem;
    background-color: var(--surface);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
}
.sidebar-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    height: 5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.sidebar-title {
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--primary);
}
.sidebar-nav {
    flex: 1;
    padding: 1rem;
}
.sidebar-footer {
    padding: 1rem;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.sidebar-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    margin: 0.25rem 0;
    font-size: 1.125rem;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    transition: color 0.2s, background-color 0.2s;
    border: none;
    background-color: transparent;
    cursor: pointer;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}
.sidebar-btn-label {
    flex-grow: 1;
    text-align: right;
}
.sidebar-btn:hover {
    background-color: rgba(var(--primary-rgb), 0.1);
    color: var(--primary-focus);
}
.sidebar-btn.active {
    background-color: var(--primary);
    color: var(--primary-content);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
}
.sidebar-btn.logout:hover {
    background-color: var(--danger-content);
    color: var(--danger);
}

/* Login Screen */
.login-screen {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    min-height: 100%;
    background-color: var(--background);
}
.login-card {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 28rem;
    padding: 2rem;
    background-color: var(--surface);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
}
.login-header { text-align: center; }
.login-title { font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--primary); }
.login-subtitle { margin-top: 0.5rem; color: var(--text-secondary); }
.login-form { margin-top: 2rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
.error-text { font-size: 0.875rem; text-align: center; color: var(--danger); }

/* Buttons */
.btn {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    border: 1px solid transparent;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05);
    transition: background-color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
    cursor: pointer;
}
.btn:disabled { background-color: var(--text-secondary); cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.7; }
.btn-primary { background-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-content); }
.btn-primary:hover { background-color: var(--primary-focus); }
.btn-secondary { background-color: var(--secondary); color: var(--primary-content); }
.btn-secondary:hover { background-color: var(--secondary-focus); }
.btn-accent { background-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-content); }
.btn-accent:hover { background-color: var(--accent-focus); }
.btn-success { background-color: var(--success); color: #fff; }
.btn-success:hover { background-color: var(--success-focus); }
.btn-danger { background-color: var(--danger); color: #fff; }
.btn-danger:hover { background-color: var(--danger-focus); }
.btn-light { background-color: var(--surface-alt); color: var(--text-primary); border-color: var(--border); }
.btn-light:hover { background-color: var(--border); }
.btn-sm { padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; }
.btn-icon { padding: 0.5rem; line-height: 1; font-size: 1.5rem; }
.btn-icon-danger { padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background-color: var(--danger-content); color: var(--danger); }
.btn-icon-danger:hover { background-color: var(--danger); color: white; }
.btn-action {
    padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    font-size: 0.75rem;
    font-weight: 600;
    border-radius: 0.25rem;
    background-color: transparent;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background-color 0.2s;
}
.btn-action.btn-info {
    color: var(--info);
    background-color: transparent;
}
.btn-action.btn-info:hover {
    background-color: var(--info-content);
}
.btn-action.btn-danger {
    color: var(--danger);
    background-color: transparent;
}
.btn-action.btn-danger:hover {
    background-color: var(--danger-content);
    color: var(--danger);
}
.btn-info { background-color: var(--info-content); color: var(--info); }
.btn-whatsapp {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
    font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: white; background-color: #25D366;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius); transition: background-color 0.2s;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
}
.btn-whatsapp:hover { background-color: #128C7E; }

/* Forms & Inputs */
.input {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    background-color: var(--surface);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05);
}
.input:focus {
    outline: 2px solid transparent;
    outline-offset: 2px;
    border-color: var(--border-focus);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--border-focus);
}
.input:disabled { background-color: var(--surface-alt); cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.7; }
textarea.input { min-height: 80px; }
.input-label { display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-primary); }
.input-label-sm { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; }

input[type=range] {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    appearance: none;
    width: 100%;
    height: 8px;
    background: var(--border);
    outline: none;
    border-radius: 4px;
}
input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    appearance: none;
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    background: var(--primary);
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 50%;
}
input[type=range]::-moz-range-thumb {
    width: 20px;
    height: 20px;
    background: var(--primary);
    cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 50%;
}

.form-container-alt {
    padding: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    background-color: var(--surface-alt);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
}
.form-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-secondary); }

/* Searchable Select (Custom Dropdown) */
.searchable-select-wrapper {
    position: relative;
}
.searchable-select-dropdown {
    position: absolute;
    top: calc(100% + 4px);
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    background-color: var(--surface);
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    max-height: 200px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    z-index: 60; /* Higher than modal overlay's z-index of 50 */
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
}
.searchable-select-option {
    padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: background-color 0.2s;
}
.searchable-select-option:hover {
    background-color: var(--surface-alt);
}
.searchable-select-option.active {
    background-color: var(--primary);
    color: var(--primary-content);
}

/* Tables */
.table-wrapper { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.table { width: 100%; text-align: right; background-color: var(--surface); border-collapse: collapse; }
.table-header { position: sticky; top: 0; background-color: var(--surface-alt); }
.table-body { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
.table-cell { padding: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; }
.table-header .table-cell { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.table-row { transition: background-color 0.2s; cursor: pointer; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
.table-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.table-row:hover { background-color: var(--surface-alt); }

/* Modal */
.modal-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; z-index: 50; }
.modal-content {
    background-color: var(--surface);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
    box-shadow: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1);
    width: 100%;
    max-height: 90vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    position: relative;
}
.modal-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); padding-bottom: 0.75rem; }
.modal-title { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; }
.modal-close-btn { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--text-secondary); background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; }
.modal-close-btn:hover { color: var(--text-primary); }
.modal-body { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; margin-top: 1rem; padding-right: 0.5rem; }
.modal-footer { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding-top: 1rem; margin-top: 1rem; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 0.75rem; }

/* Stats & Info Boxes */
.stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(1, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; }
.stat-item { padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.stat-item h3, .stat-item h4 { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; }
.stat-item p { font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; }
.stat-info { background-color: var(--info-content); border-color: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.5); }
.stat-info h3, .stat-info h4 { color: var(--info); }
.stat-info-light { background-color: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.1); border-color: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.3); opacity: 0.8; }
.stat-info-light h3, .stat-info-light h4 { color: var(--info); }
.stat-success { background-color: var(--success-content); border-color: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.5); }
.stat-success h3, .stat-success h4 { color: var(--success); }
.stat-success-light { background-color: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.1); border-color: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.3); opacity: 0.8; }
.stat-success-light h3, .stat-success-light h4 { color: var(--success); }
.stat-danger { background-color: var(--danger-content); border-color: rgba(var(--danger-rgb), 0.5); }
.stat-danger h3, .stat-danger h4 { color: var(--danger); }
.stat-secondary { background-color: rgba(var(--secondary-rgb), 0.1); border-color: rgba(var(--secondary-rgb), 0.3); }
.stat-secondary h3, .stat-secondary h4 { color: var(--secondary); }
.stat-accent { background-color: var(--accent-content); border-color: rgba(var(--accent-rgb), 0.5); }
.stat-accent h3, .stat-accent h4 { color: var(--accent); }

.info-box { padding: 1rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.info-box-alt { padding: 1rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); border: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 1.5rem; }
.info-box-title { font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }

/* Visit Card */
.visit-card {
    padding: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
    border-width: 1px;
    border-style: solid;
    border-radius: var(--border-radius);
}
.visit-card.is-exam {
    background-color: var(--success-content);
    border-color: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.5);
}
.visit-card.is-consultation {
    background-color: var(--info-content);
    border-color: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.5);
}
.visit-card-title {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1.125rem;
}
.visit-card.is-exam .visit-card-title { color: var(--success); }
.visit-card.is-consultation .visit-card-title { color: var(--info); }
.visit-card-title span {
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 1rem;
}
.visit-card-meta {
    font-size: 0.875rem;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
}


/* Visit History Thread */
.visit-thread-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-right: 2rem; 
}
.visit-item {
    position: relative;
}
.visit-item.is-parent.has-no-children {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.visit-item.is-parent::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    right: -1rem;
    top: 2rem;
    bottom: -1rem;
    width: 2px;
    background-color: var(--border);
}
.visit-thread-container:last-child .visit-item.is-parent::before,
.visit-item.is-parent.has-no-children::before {
    display: none;
}
.visit-item.is-child {
    margin-right: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}
.visit-item.is-child::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    right: -2.5rem;
    top: 2.25rem;
    width: 1.5rem;
    height: 2px;
    background-color: var(--border);
}
.visit-item.is-child::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    right: -2.5rem;
    top: -0.75rem;
    bottom: calc(100% - 2.25rem);
    width: 2px;
    background-color: var(--border);
}
.visit-item.is-child.is-last-child::after {
    bottom: calc(100% - 2.25rem);
}


/* Prescription Print */
.prescription-print { position: relative; padding: 1.5rem; background-color: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--border-radius); color: var(--text-primary); height: 100%; }
.prescription-header { margin-bottom: 2rem; }
.prescription-patient-info {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.prescription-info-item {
    position: absolute;
    white-space: nowrap;
}
.prescription-body { padding-top: 1rem; min-height: 40%; }
.prescription-items-container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
.prescription-item-print { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; }
.prescription-notes-section { margin-top: 1.5rem; }
.prescription-notes-text { padding: 0.5rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: 0.25rem; margin-top: 0.25rem; }
.prescription-follow-up { margin-top: 1.5rem; text-align: center; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9em; border: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; }
.prescription-footer { margin-top: 4rem; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; }

/* Tags */
.tag { padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 9999px; }
.tag-info { background-color: var(--info-content); color: var(--info); }
.tag-info-light { background-color: rgba(var(--info-rgb), 0.1); color: var(--info); opacity: 0.8; }
.tag-success { background-color: var(--success-content); color: var(--success); }
.tag-success-light { background-color: rgba(var(--success-rgb), 0.1); color: var(--success); opacity: 0.8; }
.tag-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background-color: var(--accent-content); color: var(--accent); }
.tag-delete-btn { color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.125rem; line-height: 1; opacity: 0.8; }
.tag-delete-btn:hover { opacity: 1; }

.symptom-tag {
    padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: 9999px;
    cursor: pointer;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
    background-color: var(--surface);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    transition: all 0.2s;
}
.symptom-tag:hover {
    background-color: var(--surface-alt);
}
.symptom-tag.active {
    background-color: var(--primary);
    color: var(--primary-content);
    border-color: var(--primary);
}
.last-consultation-tag {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem;
    margin-inline-start: 0.5rem;
    font-size: 0.8em;
    font-weight: 700;
    border-radius: 9999px;
    background-color: var(--danger-content);
    color: var(--danger);
    vertical-align: middle;
}

/* Specific highlight for chronic complaints in patient profile */
.chronic-complaints-badge {
    color: var(--danger);
    font-size: 1.25em; /* Increased size */
    font-weight: 800;
    margin-inline-start: 0.75rem;
    vertical-align: middle;
}


/* Tabs */
.tabs { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.25rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.tab-btn { padding: 0.25rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 0.375rem; transition: all 0.2s; border: none; background: transparent; cursor: pointer; }
.tab-btn.active { background-color: var(--surface); color: var(--primary-focus); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); }
.tab-btn:not(.active) { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.tabs-sm .tab-btn { padding: 0.375rem 1rem; }

/* List Item (for prescription history) */
.list-item { padding: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s; background-color: var(--surface-alt); }
.list-item:hover { background-color: var(--border); }
.list-item.active { background-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-content); }
.list-item.active p { color: var(--primary-content); }

/* AI Suggestions */
.ai-suggestion-list { list-style: disc; list-style-position: inside; background-color: var(--info-content); color: var(--info); padding: 0.75rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.suggestion-list { margin-top: 0.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; }
.suggestion-item { padding: 0.5rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; transition: background-color 0.2s; }
.suggestion-item:hover { background-color: var(--border); }
.suggestion-item span:last-child { font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent); }

/* Miscellaneous */
.placeholder-view { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 100%; text-align: center; color: var(--text-secondary); padding: 2rem; background-color: var(--surface-alt); border-radius: var(--border-radius); }
.notification { margin-top: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; border-radius: var(--border-radius); text-align: center; }
.notification-success { background-color: var(--success-content); color: var(--success); }
.dropdown-menu { position: absolute; bottom: 100%; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; right: 0; width: 12rem; background-color: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--border-radius); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); z-index: 10; padding: 0.25rem; }
.dropdown-item { display: block; width: 100%; text-align: right; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-primary); border-radius: 0.25rem; cursor: pointer; }
.dropdown-item:hover { background-color: var(--surface-alt); }

/* About Page */

<script>
    // Set theme before React loads to prevent FOUC
    (function() {
      const theme = localStorage.getItem('clinicAppTheme') || 'default';
      if (theme === 'custom') {
        const customColors = localStorage.getItem('clinicAppCustomThemeColors');
        if (customColors) {
          try {
            const colors = JSON.parse(customColors);
            const style = document.createElement('style');
            let css = ':root {';
            for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(colors)) {
              // Convert camelCase key to kebab-case for CSS variable
              const cssVar = key.replace(/[A-Z]/g, letter => `-${letter.toLowerCase()}`);
              css += `--${cssVar}: ${value};`;
            }
            css += '}';
            style.innerHTML = css;
            document.head.appendChild(style);
            // Add a class for non-customizable variables
            document.documentElement.className = 'theme-custom';
          } catch (e) {
            console.error("Failed to apply custom theme:", e);
            document.documentElement.className = 'theme-default'; // Fallback
          }
        } else {
            document.documentElement.className = 'theme-default'; // Fallback
        }
      } else {
        document.documentElement.className = 'theme-' + theme;
      }
    })();
  </script>

### المواصفات الفنية للتعديل:

1.  **الفلترة الزمنية**: إضافة أزرار تحكم (Tabs) أعلى كل تقرير تسمح للمستخدم باختيار الفترة الزمنية المطلوبة.
2.  **تقرير الأمراض الشائعة**: سيتم احتساب الأمراض بناءً على الزيارات التي تمت في الفترة المختارة فقط.
3.  **تقرير توزيع المرضى**: سيعرض التوزيع الجغرافي للمرضى الذين قاموا بزيارة العيادة فعلياً خلال الفترة المختارة، مما يعطي رؤية أدق لنشاط العيادة الجغرافي.
4.  **التصميم**: استخدام نفس أسلوب التبويبات (Tabs) المتناسق مع هوية التطبيق البصرية لضمان تجربة مستخدم سلسة.

Specifically, the original array, which maps from `patients.map(p => p.city)`, may be leading to this misinterpretation. **Clarifying Type Inference**

Even though `Patient.city` is explicitly typed as `string`, the intermediate steps involving `map`, `filter`, `Set`, and `Array.from` are apparently causing the type to be lost. I'm going to revisit each step, paying close attention to how TypeScript handles type narrowing through these transformations and whether a specific operation is the weak link.

payload.text: مع المحافظه علي كل ما سبق حين اضافه مصروفات في يوم 31 من شهر تظهر في بعض الاحيان بقوائم مصروفات الشهر الذي يليه وكان يوم 31 هذا غير موجود

**Addressing the Bug Report**

I'm focusing on the bug report about expenses on the 31st. I've confirmed the issue where entries are misplaced and not correctly categorized. I think the issue is the application is not handling end-of-month dates properly when calculating months. I'm investigating how the month is calculated to see if it makes an invalid date, and then the entry is misplaced.


**Refining Date Logic**

I'm now diving into the date calculations. It seems the core of the problem lies in how the end-of-month dates are being handled within `getExpensesForMonth`. Specifically, I'm checking the `new Date(year, month + 1, 0)` construct, which should get the last day. I'm focusing on validating this logic. I have to look into possible off-by-one errors with month indexing.


**Analyzing Timezone Effects**

I've discovered the root cause. Using `.toISOString()` is causing the problem. My tests reveal timezone shifts affect the date, leading to incorrect calculations and misplaced expenses. The date object defaults to midnight, which can result in timezone-based date changes when converted to ISO format. I am now evaluating how to convert to a DB-compatible format, using the local components.


**Investigating Date Parsing**

I'm now zeroing in on the date parsing within `ReportsView.tsx`. The core issue appears to be the inconsistent interpretation of "YYYY-MM-DD" strings across different environments. Creating a new date from the string format is not consistent. I see the discrepancies between UTC and local timezones, particularly with end-of-month dates. This could explain why the 31st entries are off. I am evaluating how to ensure consistent date interpretation.



**Confirming Root Cause**

I've pinpointed the exact issue! The `getExpensesForMonth` function in `db.ts` uses `.toISOString()` on the calculated end date. This results in the wrong date due to timezone conversion, shifting the end date from the 31st to the 30th. This explains why expenses on the 31st were excluded. I'm now updating `services/db.ts` to format date strings without this method, and also making corresponding adjustments in `ReportsView.tsx` and `StatisticsView.tsx` for consistency, in order to resolve the issue.


**Implementing Date Comparison**

I'm now focusing on ensuring consistent date filtering across the application. I realize `ReportsView.tsx` and `StatisticsView.tsx` fetch all data and filter in memory. The safe bet is to use string comparisons with `YYYY-MM-DD` for dates, which matches the database format. I am refining `db.ts` to include a helper function to format dates as strings. I'm also revising `getExpensesForMonth` to use the string formatting. I will apply these changes elsewhere as well.


**Standardizing Date Handling**

I'm now zeroing in on standardizing date filtering logic throughout. Specifically, I see `ReportsView.tsx` uses `new Date(v.date)` and compares the result. However, the date string format like "2023-01-31" can cause a comparison failure if the parsed `visitDate` defaults to UTC midnight. This might be why the 31st entries were excluded. I have to change the logic to string comparisons with the dates or ensure all dates are local midnight. I will opt for using string comparisons.


**Revisiting Date Ranges**

I'm now back in `ReportsView.tsx`, double-checking date comparisons. It seems the problem arises with timezones when comparing dates at the end of the month. I have observed the `startDate` and `endDate` calculations are correct, but the issue lies in how dates are represented internally, especially when `v.date` is parsed as UTC. I'm focusing on ensuring consistency in comparing dates, particularly when the timezone shifts midnight. It now appears that the comparisons are failing due to the date object's internal representation changing depending on timezone.

هذا الخطأ شائع جداً عند التعامل مع التواريخ في المتصفحات بسبب "فروق التوقيت" (Timezone offset). عند استخدام دالة `toISOString()`، يقوم المتصفح بتحويل التاريخ من التوقيت المحلي للجهاز إلى التوقيت العالمي (UTC)، مما يؤدي أحياناً لرجوع التاريخ يوماً واحداً للخلف (يصبح يوم 31 هو يوم 30) أو العكس، وهذا ما يفسر اختفاء يوم 31 من تقارير الشهر أو ظهوره في شهر آخر.

سأقوم بتعديل منطق جلب وتصفية البيانات في ملف الخدمات (`db.ts`) وفي واجهات التقارير والإحصائيات ليعتمد كلياً على التوقيت المحلي للكمبيوتر دون أي تحويلات للـ UTC، مما يضمن ظهور يوم 31 في مكانه الصحيح دائماً.

### التعديلات التي تم تنفيذها:
1.  **في ملف `services/db.ts`**: استبدال دالة `toISOString` بدالة تنسيق يدوية تحافظ على اليوم كما هو مدخل.
2.  **في ملف `components/ReportsView.tsx`**: تحويل منطق الفلترة ليعتمد على مقارنة السلاسل النصية (Strings) بدلاً من كائنات التاريخ المتغيرة.
3.  **في ملف `components/StatisticsView.tsx`**: تعديل منطق الإحصائيات الشهرية والسنوية لضمان عدم فقدان أي أيام عند المقارنة.

entries.description: إصلاح مشكلة اختفاء يوم 31 في المصروفات والزيارات عن طريق تجنب استخدام toISOString الذي يغير التاريخ بناءً على المنطقة الزمنية.
تعديل منطق احتساب التقرير الشهري ليعتمد على مقارنة النصوص (YYYY-MM) بدلاً من الكائنات المتأثرة بفروق التوقيت لضمان دقة يوم 31.
تعديل منطق الفلترة في الإحصائيات ليعتمد على السلاسل النصية بدلاً من كائنات التواريخ لتجنب أخطاء المنطقة الزمنية في يوم 31.
